ghostPost.plaintext:
Integrate Ghost with Buttondown to ensure your readers can subscribe to your
newsletter content

Buttondown.email [https://buttondown.email/]  is a email newsletter solution
that allows you to focus on writing a great newsletter in an editor of your
choice by allowing you to paste some Markdown or HTML into the tool and send it
to your subscribers.

If you're using Buttondown to power your email newsletter, you'll probably want
to embed a subscription widget onto your Ghost publication. Here's how:

Copy the URL of your newsletter
Grab the URL of the newsletter you'd like to embed a subscription widget for
onto your post or page

Paste it into the Ghost editor
When you paste it into the Ghost editor it'll be automatically transformed into
a rich embed of the subscription widget:

Publish your post
That's all there is to it! Ghost interacts with Buttondown via their OEmbed
[https://oembed.com/]  API in order to retrieve all the correct settings
automatically and serve your widget in the best way possible.

Here's an example of the final result:
ghostPost.html:
Integrate Ghost with Buttondown to ensure your readers can subscribe to your newsletter content

Buttondown.email is a email newsletter solution that allows you to focus on writing a great newsletter in an editor of your choice by allowing you to paste some Markdown or HTML into the tool and send it to your subscribers.

If you're using Buttondown to power your email newsletter, you'll probably want to embed a subscription widget onto your Ghost publication. Here's how:

Copy the URL of your newsletter

Grab the URL of the newsletter you'd like to embed a subscription widget for onto your post or page

Paste it into the Ghost editor

When you paste it into the Ghost editor it'll be automatically transformed into a rich embed of the subscription widget:

Publish your post

That's all there is to it! Ghost interacts with Buttondown via their OEmbed API in order to retrieve all the correct settings automatically and serve your widget in the best way possible.

Here's an example of the final result:

tags.meta_title: Utility Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Integrate your Ghost site with your favourite utility apps & tools to optimise your site & automate workflows. Connect with Netlify, Cloudinary and more!

tags.meta_title: Automation Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Automate your workflows and connect all of your apps, tools and services with your Ghost publication with these sensible integrations!

tags.name: Content

tags.meta_description: Keep all of your favourite content tools and apps connected to your Ghost site with these integrations. Connect Unsplash, Twitter, Instagram & many more!

tags.meta_description: Keep your community and your readers connected and connect your favourite apps and tools to your Ghost site, including Slack, Helpscout & many more!

tags.name: Surveys & Forms
tags.meta_title: Survey Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Add surveys & forms to your Ghost site via integrations with Google Forms, Typeform and SurveyMonkey. Find out how to gather data from your readers.

tags.name: SEO
tags.meta_title: SEO Integrations: Connect your favourite apps & tools  – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Ghost comes with most core SEO features baked in, plus you can use our integrations to extend this further with custom Twitter cards and full AMP support.

tags.name: Social
tags.meta_title: Social Media Integrations: Connect your favourite channels – Ghost
tags.meta_description: Ghost supports custom Twitter & Facebook cards  and the editor automatically embeds social media cards. Find out more about our social media integrations.
